eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Olmsted, MN; at 9:36 AM on APR 17, 2019 Effective until 12:06 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Emergency Alert System for the City of Rochester.  If this was a real emergency, instructions would follow with steps to take for personal safety.  This is only a test. No instructions at this time.  This is only a test.
